description_long: This range hood features a rectangular, boxy main body with a horizontally striped pattern in alternating dark and light shades. The upper section includes a prominent vented area, likely constructed from a perforated or mesh material, which extends outward from the main housing. Thin vertical rods or supports are visible at the sides of the vented section, possibly for structural reinforcement or as part of a mounting system. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with clean lines and a focus on function. The surface appears to be made of metal, likely stainless steel or aluminum, with a glossy or semi-reflective finish. No visible control panel, lighting fixtures, or brand logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A modern, rectangular range hood with a striped metallic finish and a prominent vented section extending from the main body. The design is sleek and functional, with no visible controls or lighting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the striped main body and the extended vented section with thin vertical supports.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the vented area and the symmetrical layout of the range hood.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the vented extension and main housing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the main body and the vented section, with vertical supports visible.
attribute_vent_placement: The vent or exhaust openings are located on the top and front-facing section of the extended vented area.
attribute_filter_design: The filter appears to be a flat, rectangular mesh integrated into the vented section, likely made of metal.
